banana: Curved elongated shape with tapering ends
Smooth surface with slight ridges along the curve
Consistent curvature along the main axis
Lacks flat surfaces or sharp edges
box: Rectangular or cuboidal shape with flat planar surfaces
Uniform height, width, and depth proportions
camel: Organic, asymmetrical shape with four distinct limb-like structures
Raised central hump(s) on the back
Elongated neck and small head structure
Thin leg-like appendages relative to the body
Non-uniform surface curvature representing fur and body contours
can: Flat circular top and bottom surfaces
Smooth continuous side surface without protrusions
Consistent radial symmetry around central axis
dish: Thin and smooth outer rim with a shallow central depression
Flat or slightly raised base for stability
Gradual curvature from edge toward center
drill_ achine: Elongated main body with a cylindrical or pistol-like grip
Protruding front section for the drill bit
Irregular industrial shape with mechanical features (vents, grooves)
Combination of curved and planar surfaces
mouse: Smooth curved upper shell with asymmetrical contour
Raised central dome shape toward the back
Absence of sharp edges or flat planes
pears: Bulbous lower region tapering toward a narrow top
Thin stem-like feature at the top
Non-uniform curvature and subtle surface irregularities
scissors: Two elongated blades intersecting at a central pivot point
Looped or circular handles connected to each blade
Thin flat planar blades with sharp edges
Angular structure with a defined crossing axis
Combination of linear and curved geometric features
shampoo bottle: Tall cylindrical or slightly rectangular body
Smooth continuous surface with rounded edges
Narrow neck and cap structure at the top
Consistent vertical symmetry around central axis
